Portfolio

Technical
Projects

Proyek
Teknis

Smart Lighting IoT — Indoor Hydroponics
Smart Lighting IoT — Hidroponik Indoor
2025
ESP32 C++ / Arduino IDE Blynk IoT BH1750 DHT22 Final Year Project

Developed an ESP32-based IoT system that automatically controls LED Grow Light based on real-time light intensity, temperature, and humidity data. Integrated with the Blynk platform for remote smartphone monitoring and control. System successfully maintained optimal lighting conditions, improving plant growth efficiency and indoor air quality.

Mengembangkan sistem IoT berbasis ESP32 yang mengontrol LED Grow Light secara otomatis berdasarkan data intensitas cahaya, suhu, dan kelembapan secara real-time. Terintegrasi dengan platform Blynk untuk monitoring dan kontrol via smartphone. Sistem berhasil menjaga kondisi pencahayaan optimal, meningkatkan efisiensi pertumbuhan tanaman dan kualitas udara.

github.com/aquillaluthfie/Smart-Lighting-IoT-Indoor-Hydroponics-Air-Purifier
BWE Greasing Control System Analysis
Analisis Sistem Kendali Greasing BWE
2024
Heavy Equipment Fault Diagnosis Sensor Repair PT Bukit Asam Tbk

Industrial internship project at PT Bukit Asam Tbk — analyzed and resolved faults in the Bucket Wheel Excavator superstructure greasing control system. Identified broken sensor connections, performed targeted repairs, and improved overall system reliability by ±95%. Documented in a technical maintenance report.

Proyek kerja praktik industri di PT Bukit Asam Tbk — menganalisis dan menyelesaikan gangguan pada sistem kendali greasing superstruktur Bucket Wheel Excavator. Mengidentifikasi koneksi sensor yang rusak, melakukan perbaikan terarah, dan meningkatkan keandalan sistem hingga ±95%. Didokumentasikan dalam laporan pemeliharaan teknis.

Line Follower Robot & Race Start System
Robot Line Follower & Sistem Lampu Start Balapan
2023
Arduino Sequential Logic Relay Control C++

Built a Line Follower robot using IR sensors and an automated race start light system using sequential relay logic. Simulated and validated circuits in TinkerCAD and Proteus before physical implementation.

Membangun robot Line Follower menggunakan sensor IR dan sistem lampu start balapan otomatis menggunakan logika relay sekuensial. Simulasi dan validasi sirkuit di TinkerCAD dan Proteus sebelum implementasi fisik.
